title: Generating personalized user recommendations using word vectors
abstract: In various example embodiments, a system and method for constructing and scoring word vectors between natural language words and generating output to a user in the form of personalized recommendations are presented.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A system to generate personalized user recommendations comprising: an access module to access a natural language data structure, the natural language data structure containing a plurality of words associated with at least one data item; a word vector construction module to construct a plurality of word vectors between the plurality of words within the natural language data structure, a word vector representing a virtual connection between two words within the plurality of words; an assessment module to determine a score for at least one word vector, the score for the at least one word vector comprising a measurement of contextual relatedness between words connected by the word vector; an identification module to associate a user identifier to at least one data item with which a user has had a user interaction, a mapping module to map at least one natural language word contained in a part of at least one user-identified data item with at least one word within a plurality of data items; a word ranking module to rank words within the plurality of words responsive to a score of word vectors associated with at least one natural language word contained in a part of the at least one user-identifi ed data item; a recommendation ranking module to rank recommendation data items responsive to the ranking of words within the plurality of words; and an output module to generate an output, to a user, of at least one recommended data item. 2. The system of claim 1, wherein the assessment module is further to assign a coefficient to a word vector responsive to the score of the word vector, the coefficient including a scaled number between 0 and I representing the score. 3. The svstem of claim 1, wherein the user interaction includes a contextual identifier, the contextual identifier including accessing a data item, viewing the data item, storing the data item, or causing processing of the data item. 4. The system of claim 3, wherein the identification module is further to assign a quality score to the user interaction responsive to the contextual identifier included in the user interaction. 5. The system of claim 4, wherein the mapping module is further to rank words contained in a part of the user-identified data item responsive to the quality score assigned to the user interaction. 6. The system of claim 4, wherein the word ranking module is further to rank words within the plurality of words responsive to the quality score assigned to the user interaction associated with the data item. 7. The system of claim 1, wherein the mapping module is further to semantically refine at least one word contained in a part of at least one data item, semantic refinement including operations to assess whether a semantic context of a word contained in a part of the at least one data item meets a semantic threshold with a word within the plurality of words and to substitute the word within the plurality of words for the word contained in a part of the at least one data item based on the semantic threshold being met. 8. The system of claim 1, wherein the mapping module is further to edit distance refine at least one word contained in a part of at least one data item, edit distance refinement including operations to assess whether a edit distance of a word contained in the part of the at least one data item meets an edit distance threshold with a word within the plurality of words and to substitute the word within the plurality or words for the word contained in the part of the at least one data item based on the edit distance threshold being met. 9. The system of claim 1, wherein the output module is further to generate output related to a collection recommendation responsive to receiving an indication that a recommended data item is a part of a collection. 10. The system of claim 1, wherein the output module is further to generate output related to a guide recommendation responsive to receiving an indication that other users engaging in interactions with the recommended data item also engage in interactions with a guide associated with the recommended data item. 1 . The system of claim 1, wherein the recommendation ranking module is further to receive an indication that a user has engaged in multiple user interactions with a recommended data item and to assign a higher recommendation ranking to the recommended data item. 12. The system of claim 11 , wherein the recommendation ranking module is further to receive an indication that the user interactions have not included fully processing a recommended data item, and to further assign a higher recommendation ranking to the recommended data item. 13. A computer implemented method for generating personalized user recommendations, the method comprising: accessing, using at least one processor, a natural language data structure, the natural language data structure containing a plurality of words; constructing a plurality of word vectors between the plurality of words within the natural language data structure, a word vector comprising a virtual connection between two words within the plurality of words; determining a score for at least one word vector, the score for the at least one word vector comprising a measurement of contextual relatedness between words connected by the word vector; associating a user identifier to at least one data item with which a user has had a user interaction; 

 mapping at least one natural language word contained in a part of at least one user- identified data item with at least one word within a plurality of data items; ranking words within the plurality of words responsive to a score of word vectors associated with at least one natural language word contained in a part of the at least one user-identified data item, ranking recommendation data items responsive to the ranking of words within the plurality, and generating an output, to a user, of at least one recommended data item. 14. The method of claim 13, wherein determining the score includes assigning a coefficient to a word vector responsive to the score of the word vector, the coefficient including a scaled number between 0 and 1 representing the score. 15. The method of claim 13, wherein the user interaction includes a contextual identifier, a contextual identifier including accessing a data item, viewing a data item, storing a data item, or causing processing of a data item. 16. The method of claim 15, wherein associating the user identifier further includes assigning a quality score to the user interaction responsive to the contextual identifier included in the user interaction. 17. The method of claim 16, wherein mapping at least one natural language word contained in the part of the user-identified data item further includes ranking words within the plurality of words responsive to a quality score of at least one user interaction associated with a data item. 18. The method of claim 17, wherein ranking words within the plurality of words further includes ranking words within the plurality of words responsive to the quality score of at least one user interaction associated with a data item. 19. The method of claim 13, wherein mapping at least one natural language word further includes semantic refinement of at least one word contained in a part of at least one data item, semantic refinement including operations to assess whether a semantic context of a word contained in a part of at least one data item meets a semantic threshold with a word within the plurality and substituting the word within the plurality of words for the word contained in a part of at least one data item if the threshold is met. 20. A machine-readable storage medium comprising instructions that, when executed by one or more processors of a machine, cause the machine to perform operations comprising: accessing a natural language data structure, the natural language data structure containing a plurality of words, constructing a plurality of word vectors between the plurality of words within the natural language data structure, a word vector comprising a virtual connection between two words within the plurality of words, determining a score for at least one word vector, the score for the at least one word vector comprising a measurement of contextual relatedness between words connected by the word vector; associating a user identifier to at least one data item with which a user has had a user interaction; mapping at least one natural language word contained in a part of at least one user- identified data item with at least one word within a plurality of data items; ranking words within the plurality of words responsive to a score of word vectors associated with at least one natural language word contained in a part of the at least one user-identified data item; ranking recommendation data items responsive to the ranking of words within the plurality; and generating an output, to a user, of at least one recommended data item.
